data.body:
[Temporary Maintenance Notice]

Temporary maintenance will take place at the following time to improve game stability and performance.

- Schedule: August 31 (Sun), 1:22 PM (UTC) ~ Until further notice
- Impact: Game access will be unavailable during the maintenance period
- Compensation: TBA
- Details: TBA
